title: spermacoce brevidens
intro: Spermacoce brevidens, also known as Short-spurred Spermacoce or Short-spurred Houstonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Spermacoce brevidens include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Spermacoce brevidens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
